column1: # /Worksheet Global Format Date — Date submenu mirrors /RFD.
# Picking D1..D5 (or Time 1..4) sets the workbook-wide default format
# for cells that have no explicit per-cell format.
# /WGFD opens the Date submenu (1..5, plus Time).
# Pick D1 → applied to the workbook directly (no decimals, no POINT).
